# Select Component Documentation

Data-driven, accessible Select (single-choice dropdown) component for Svelte 5.

## Overview

`Select` renders a trigger button + dropdown listbox. It uses the `Wrapper` + `Navigator` + `ProxyItem`
stack (identical to `List`) for consistent keyboard navigation and field mapping.

## Component API

### Props

- `options: SelectItem[]` — Array of option objects or group objects (with `children`)
- `fields: Record<string, string>` — Field mapping overrides (default: `{ text: 'label', value: 'value', icon: 'icon', children: 'children', disabled: 'disabled' }`)
- `value: unknown` (bindable) — Currently selected value (extracted via `fields.value`)
- `selected: SelectItem | null` (bindable) — Currently selected raw item object
- `placeholder: string` — Text shown when nothing is selected (default: `'Select...'`)
- `size: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'` — Size variant (default: `'md'`)
- `align: 'left' | 'right'` — Dropdown alignment (default: `'left'`)
- `direction: 'up' | 'down'` — Dropdown slide direction (default: `'down'`)
- `maxRows: number` — Max visible rows before scroll (default: `5`)
- `disabled: boolean` — Disable the entire select (default: `false`)
- `filterable: boolean` — Show a search input in the dropdown (default: `false`)
- `filterPlaceholder: string` — Placeholder for the filter input (default: `'Search...'`)
- `class: string` — Additional CSS classes on the root element
- `icons: SelectStateIcons` — Override expand/collapse/check icon classes

### Snippets

- `option(proxy: ProxyItem)` — Custom rendering for dropdown options
- `groupLabel(proxy: ProxyItem)` — Custom rendering for group header labels
- `selectedValue(proxy: ProxyItem)` — Custom rendering in the trigger button when a value is selected
- `[name](proxy: ProxyItem)` — Per-item snippet; set `item.snippet = 'name'` to route specific items

### Events

- `onchange(value: unknown, item: SelectItem)` — Fired when selection changes

## ProxyItem API

All snippets receive a `ProxyItem` instance:

- `proxy.text` — Mapped display text
- `proxy.icon` — Mapped icon class
- `proxy.value` — Extracted value field (primitive)
- `proxy.disabled` — Whether the item is disabled
- `proxy.get('field')` — Read any field by mapped or raw name

## Usage Examples

### Basic

```svelte
<script>
  import { Select } from '@rokkit/ui'

  const fruits = [
    { label: 'Apple', value: 'apple' },
    { label: 'Banana', value: 'banana' },
    { label: 'Cherry', value: 'cherry' }
  ]
  let value = $state(null)
</script>

<Select options={fruits} bind:value placeholder="Choose a fruit" />
```

### Field Mapping

```svelte
<script>
  import { Select } from '@rokkit/ui'

  const countries = [
    { name: 'United States', code: 'US' },
    { name: 'Germany', code: 'DE' }
  ]
  const fields = { text: 'name', value: 'code' }
  let value = $state(null)
</script>

<Select options={countries} {fields} bind:value placeholder="Select a country" />
```

### Grouped Options

```svelte
<script>
  import { Select } from '@rokkit/ui'

  const options = [
    {
      label: 'Fruits',
      children: [
        { label: 'Apple', value: 'apple' },
        { label: 'Banana', value: 'banana' }
      ]
    },
    {
      label: 'Vegetables',
      children: [
        { label: 'Carrot', value: 'carrot' },
        { label: 'Broccoli', value: 'broccoli' }
      ]
    }
  ]
  let value = $state(null)
</script>

<Select {options} bind:value placeholder="Choose a food" />
```

### Filterable

```svelte
<Select options={countries} bind:value filterable placeholder="Select a country" />
```

### Custom Option Snippet

```svelte
<Select options={statuses} bind:value placeholder="Select a status">
  {#snippet option(proxy)}
    <span class="dot {proxy.get('color')}"></span>
    <span>{proxy.text}</span>
  {/snippet}
</Select>
```

## Data Attributes for Styling

- `data-select` — Root container
- `data-open` — Present when dropdown is open
- `data-size` — Size variant (`sm`, `md`, `lg`)
- `data-disabled` — Present when select is disabled
- `data-align` — Alignment (`left`, `right`)
- `data-direction` — Direction (`up`, `down`)
- `data-select-trigger` — The trigger button
- `data-select-value` — Value display area in trigger
- `data-select-placeholder` — Placeholder span
- `data-select-value-text` — Selected value text
- `data-select-arrow` — Dropdown arrow icon
- `data-select-dropdown` — The dropdown listbox
- `data-select-filter` — Filter input wrapper
- `data-select-option` — An option button
- `data-selected` — Present on the currently selected option
- `data-select-check` — Checkmark icon on selected option
- `data-select-group` — A group container
- `data-select-group-label` — Group header
- `data-select-divider` — Divider between groups
- `data-select-empty` — Empty state when filter returns no results

## Keyboard Navigation

- `ArrowDown` / `ArrowUp` on trigger — opens dropdown
- `Enter` / `Space` on trigger — toggles dropdown
- `ArrowDown` / `ArrowUp` in dropdown — navigate options
- `Enter` / `Space` on option — selects it and closes
- `Escape` — closes dropdown and returns focus to trigger
- When `filterable`: `ArrowDown` from filter input moves to first option; `Enter` selects focused option

## Field Mapping Defaults

Default `PROXY_ITEM_FIELDS` mapping (used when no `fields` prop is passed):

```js
{
  text: 'label',
  value: 'value',
  icon: 'icon',
  href: 'href',
  children: 'children',
  disabled: 'disabled',
  snippet: 'snippet'
}
```

Override only the fields you need:
```js
fields={{ text: 'name', value: 'id' }}
```
